assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md preserves the existing trustify-backend entry in the Repository Registry unchanged (same Role, Serena Instance, Path values as in claude-md-configured.md)
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md line 7 contains '| trustify-backend | Rust backend service | serena_backend | /home/user/trustify-backend |' which exactly matches the original claude-md-configured.md line 16.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md adds a new trustify-ui entry to the Repository Registry with serena_ui as the Serena Instance
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md line 8 contains '| trustify-ui | TypeScript frontend | serena_ui | /home/user/trustify-ui |' — a new row with serena_ui as the Serena Instance.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md preserves all existing Jira Configuration fields unchanged — Project key remains TC, Cloud ID, Feature issue type ID remain as in claude-md-configured.md
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md lines 12-16 contain all five Jira fields exactly matching the original: Project key: TC, Cloud ID: 2b9e35e3-6bd3-4cec-b838-f4249ee02432, Feature issue type ID: 10142, Git Pull Request custom field: customfield_10875, GitHub Issue custom field: customfield_10747.

assertion_results.text: outputs/changes-log.md explicitly identifies which entries were preserved (existing) and which were added (new)
assertion_results.evidence: changes-log.md has a '## Preserved (unchanged)' section listing trustify-backend row, all Jira fields, and Code Intelligence content as preserved. It has a '## Added (new)' section listing the trustify-ui row and the serena_ui limitation entry. The log explicitly labels entries as preserved vs. added.

assertion_results.text: outputs/discovery-log.md notes that serena_backend was already configured and serena_ui is newly discovered
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-log.md table at lines 12-13 shows: serena_backend with status 'Already configured in Repository Registry' and serena_ui with status 'NEW — not yet in Repository Registry'. Section headers also label them '### serena_backend (already configured)' and '### serena_ui (new)'.

assertion_results.text: The existing Code Intelligence section content (naming convention, example, serena_backend limitations) is preserved — only new serena_ui content is added
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md lines 20-33 preserve the original Code Intelligence content verbatim: the naming convention explanation ('Tools are prefixed by Serena instance name'), the serena_backend find_symbol example (lines 25-29), and the serena_backend limitation ('rust-analyzer may take 30-60 seconds to index on first use' at line 33). The only addition is line 34: '- `serena_ui`: No limitations known'.
